surfaceNotes: Mixed surface quality. Ripple strips on some exits. Generally flat Canterbury Plains.
elevationProfile: Generally flat — Canterbury Plains. Minor undulations.

corners.name: Turn 1 – Pit Straight End

gazeTargets.brakingReference: Lift point marker on right side of main straight.
gazeTargets.apexFixation: Left kink kerb — minimal steering input.

corners.approach: End of pit straight at high speed.
corners.notes: Fast left kink. Flat-out or near flat-out. Minimal steering input needed.

corners.name: Turn 2 – Open Left
corners.notes: Open-radius left-hander. Good visibility through. Can carry speed.

corners.name: Turn 3 – Left
corners.notes: Medium left corner leading into the hairpin approach.

corners.name: Turn 4 – Left Hairpin

gazeTargets.apexFixation: Inside left kerb at tightest point.

corners.notes: Slowest left-hand corner. Late apex to maximise exit speed. Critical corner.
corners.weakCornerReason: Slowest point — late apex discipline required. Exit speed affects entire back section.

corners.name: Turn 5 – Kink Right
corners.approach: From Turn 4 exit on back section.
corners.notes: Quick right kink on back section. Flat-out or near flat-out.

corners.name: Turn 6 – Tight Right
corners.notes: Hard braking into tight right. Good exit matters for the run to Turn 7.

corners.name: Turn 7 – Sweeping Left
corners.exitTo: Short run to long right hairpin.
corners.notes: Fast sweeping left. Requires commitment and smooth steering. Long arc.

corners.name: Turn 8 – Long Right Hairpin

gazeTargets.apexFixation: Right inside kerb at tightest point.

corners.notes: Long right hairpin. Slowest part of back section. Patience through the slow section.
corners.weakCornerReason: Longest slow-speed corner. Late apex required for good exit onto next section.

corners.name: Turn 9 – Tight Right
corners.notes: Tight right in the complex before final corner.

corners.name: Turn 10 – Tight Left

gazeTargets.exitTarget: Exit kerb, short straight to final corner.

corners.notes: Tight left before final corner. Exit speed is critical.

corners.name: Turn 11 – Final Hairpin Left

gazeTargets.apexFixation: Left inside kerb at tightest point.

corners.exitTo: Pit straight — drive out determines lap time.
corners.notes: Final left hairpin onto pit straight. Late apex for best drive out. Critical for lap time.
corners.weakCornerReason: Exit directly onto main straight — exit speed determines entire straight speed.

problemCornersForQuietEye.issue: Left hairpin — slowest corner, requires late apex patience.
problemCornersForQuietEye.remedy: Train eyes to wait for the inside kerb at tightest point. Exit gaze must snap to the back section opening.

problemCornersForQuietEye.issue: Long right hairpin — longest slow-speed corner on the circuit.
problemCornersForQuietEye.remedy: Patience through the slow section. Late apex on the right kerb. Exit gaze to track opening left.

problemCornersForQuietEye.issue: Final hairpin onto pit straight — highest lap time impact.
problemCornersForQuietEye.remedy: Late apex, commit to left inside kerb. Exit gaze to pit straight centre immediately.

_source: Verified driver data — 11 corners confirmed (7 left, 4 right)
